name: Taco Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot or kettle, lightly brown the ground beef and onion over medium heat.
2. Stir in the diced tomatoes, kidney beans, corn, tomato sauce, mushrooms (with stems removed), and taco seasoning. Mix well to combine.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and let it simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
4. To serve, garnish each bowl with shredded cheese, diced avocado, sour cream, and corn chips as desired.
